## Project Details
- **Name**: PoC-Phylotree
- **Purpose**: Phylogenetic tree visualization using phylotree.js
- **Technology**: React + TypeScript + Vite + D3.js + phylotree.js
- **Target**: Large phylogenetic datasets (thousands of species)
